name: MeshChain Public Testnet
warning: TESTNET ONLY — no real value. Balances can be wiped. Do not send mainnet funds here.

mesh.channel_purpose: Private Meshtastic channel for testnet funds traffic (create locally; share PSK only with test participants)
mesh.do_not_use: Public LongFast / default chat for real balances

faucet.how: Run mesh testnet-setup (local faucet key) or ask a testnet operator. No mainnet SOL/ETH/BTC faucet.

solana_bridge.note: Hybrid vault program targets Solana devnet only on this testnet. Never mainnet until audit.
solana_bridge.program_status: source in programs-mesh-bridge — deploy to devnet separately

how_to_join: Optional: create Meshtastic channel MeshChain-Testnet-1 with trusted peers
mesh new-wallet && use faucet/demo funds only
reset_policy: Operators may reset meshchain-testnet-1 state at any time. Export nothing of value.
